overall.description: Static cinematic shot of a medieval fantasy bedroom interior from a video game, featuring wooden bunk beds, a ladder, and diamond-paned windows illuminated by warm interior lighting against a dark night sky visible through the window. The scene remains completely unchanged throughout the clip with no camera movement or action.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval fantasy bedroom with bunk beds

agents.ego_description: Stationary observation of the bedroom interior from a low fixed position near the ground, maintaining a steady view of the bunk bed and window

entered.detail: Two-level wooden bunk bed with sturdy timber frame, upper safety railing, and dark wood finish
Wooden ladder with evenly spaced rungs leaning against the bunk bed leading to the upper level
Gothic-style window with diamond-patterned leaded glass panes glowing with dark blue night light
Heavy dark green draped curtains with gold trim framing the right side of the window
Wooden storage chest or trunk with curved lid at the foot of the lower bunk
White fluffy pillows and rumpled bedding on the lower bunk mattress

segments.scene_description: A completely static view of a cozy medieval fantasy bedroom interior, likely from a video game such as Hogwarts Legacy. The scene centers on a wooden bunk bed with a ladder, illuminated by warm interior lighting that contrasts with the dark blue night visible through the diamond-paned window. Heavy green curtains frame the window to the right, while a wooden chest sits at the foot of the bed. The camera remains locked in position throughout the entire clip, capturing the quiet, empty room with no movement or changes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a completely static and unchanging view of a cozy medieval fantasy bedroom interior. It begins with a locked perspective on a wooden bunk bed and ladder, bathed in warm interior lighting that contrasts with the dark blue night sky. As the gaze lingers, the scene remains fixed on the diamond-paned window framed by heavy green curtains and a wooden chest resting at the foot of the bed. The environment persists in this quiet, empty state, with no shifts in light or movement before the shot concludes.
